meta.title: THE ORDER
meta.description: The Order of men Devoted to Principals and Prosperity – “God Wills It”

code.heading: Who We Are
code.intro:
We are THE ORDER. We are the antithesis of hedonism. In a world of fading values, we remain steadfast as righteous men of heart, soul, mind and strength. We are the Order of men who uphold the old ways of chivalry and nobility -- ways that have been lost, buried, and actively destroyed. We are gentlemen, we are fathers, husbands, brothers, lovers, men of God. But we are also savages -- ruthlessly capable of defending one another, and those it is our duty to protect.

We are men of Truth, Action and Virtue; an ageless Brotherhood.

founder.heading: Who Am I
paragraphs: I am a former SAS tier-1 (Special Operations) Operator with three kill/capture combat deployments and thirteen years in the military; I have overcome and thrived through PTSD and autoimmunity post war; I am a Master Freemason and a Knight of the Order of Saint Martino, Rome; I am a Founder, an artist, a lover, a gentleman, a man of God, and a savage.

I watched, patiently, waiting for an organisation, a leader, someone or something to come forth and restore the Order - to bring us back to the old ways, to be masculine and righteous again. And it has not come, yet.
"Be the change you wish to see in the world." - Mahatma Gandhi
So I became what I wished to see in this world; and I ask you to come with us.

cards.title: Alexander Merutka — CEO & Founder of Craftsman+ and Node Media
Tony Litster — Entrepreneur, coach and real estate developer
Tommy Johnstone — CEO and Founder of Polar

faq.heading: Questions a Serious Man Asks
faq.questions:
Do you wish not only to heal, but to transform and prosper?
Are you tired of swimming upstream from your destiny and highest self?
Are you capable, humble and courageous enough to pass an eight-week program?
Do you want to stand in a global brotherhood of savage gentlemen who hold the same principles as you?
Do you want to attend daring, fun, life-changing retreats and bond with those same high calibre brethren?
Do you want to work daily -- be held accountable, and hold others accountable -- toward lasting transformation and reinvention?
Do you want to be the truest, most authentic version of yourself, released from the shackles of fear and attachment?

howWeOperate.heading: How We Operate & What to Expect
paragraphs: We meet virtually (online) -- except for in-person retreats.
Our initial eight-week program ("The Program") is where you start: learning to become your own mentor and the "youest you," aligned with your own self-determined growth and prosperity.
At the end of  The Program, if it is a "fuck yes" from you and a "fuck yes" from us, you will be invited into the brotherhood.

You are now an alumnus of  THE ORDER -- but this is where the real work begins. Thereafter, we meet once a week, ongoing, to forge real, true and lasting transformation, directed by you, in your own order of necessity.
You are not alone. The other half of  THE ORDER is the power of your brotherhood -- the men beside you, holding one another accountable, daily, in community.

Retreats are held every two to four months, varying in activity so you can choose the one/s that best serve your prosperity and needs. One retreat per year must be attended, unless you are financially limited. Retreats include survival, indigenous medicine, combative, adventure, celebration, leisure, etc.

After one to two years as an alumnus -- once you have shown commitment, dedication and awareness -- you will be "accoutred" by THE ORDER. I hope to see each of you there because I will be your biggest advocate.
howWeOperate.pullQuote: If it's not a fuck yes, it's a no.

verses.text: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.
